reviews.comment:
Pésimos!!! Paré en la ruta con mi perra a comprar en el kiosko y no me dejaron entrar con ella a upa...desastrosos.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible!!! I stopped on the road with my dog ​​to buy something at the kiosk and they wouldn't let me in with her in my arms...disastrous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMd3BPUmNBEAE

reviews.comment:
hoy pare a cargar combustible aprox 17.30 hs 2 personas atendiendo con cara de pocos amigos. muy mala impronta no solo para atender sino que la amabilidad se la llevaron a marzo
falto que me digan "anda ala Shell"

(Translated by Google)
Today I stopped to fill up around 5:30 pm. Two people were serving me, and they looked very unfriendly. They gave a terrible impression, not only in terms of service but also because they seemed to have lost all sense of courtesy. They practically told me to "go to Shell."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6OW9pN0JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo estaba operativo el baño para discapacitados...los baños de hombres y para mujeres cerrados con llave...tuve que esperar al aire libre con viento y frio...cola de cinco personas antes que yo entre 15 y 20 minutos

(Translated by Google)
Only the accessible restroom was open...the men's and women's restrooms were locked...I had to wait outside in the wind and cold...there was a queue of five people ahead of me for 15 to 20 minutes
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUanVtWWd3RRAB
